description: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to small and marginal farmer families across India.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year credited directly to bank account in three installments of ₹2,000 each.

description: Housing scheme providing financial assistance to homeless and kutcha house dwellers in rural areas to construct pucca houses.
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas for house construction.

scheme_name: National Scholarship Portal — Pre-Matric SC Scholarship
description: Scholarship for SC students studying in Class 9 and 10 to prevent dropout and encourage continuation of education.
benefits: ₹150/month (day scholar) or ₹350/month (hosteller) plus one-time ad-hoc grant of ₹750/₹1,000.

description: Financial support for OBC students pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary education to complete their education.
benefits: Maintenance allowance of ₹230–₹1,200/month + course fee reimbursement depending on course type.

description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to unforeseen events like natural calamities, pests and diseases.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss; premiums as low as 1.5% for Rabi crops and 2% for Kharif crops, rest paid by government.

description: Small savings scheme for the girl child to ensure financial security for education and marriage expenses.
benefits: High interest rate (currently 8.2% p.a.), tax benefits under Section 80C, partial withdrawal allowed at age 18.

description: Collateral-free microfinance loan for small business owners and entrepreneurs for starting or expanding micro enterprises.
benefits: Loans up to ₹50,000 (Shishu), ₹5 lakh (Kishore), ₹10 lakh (Tarun) at subsidized interest rates.

description: Government-backed pension scheme for workers in the unorganized sector ensuring guaranteed minimum pension after retirement.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000 per month from age 60 based on contribution amount.

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat — PM Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Health insurance scheme covering secondary and tertiary hospitalization for poor and vulnerable families.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization at empanelled hospitals.

description: State scheme providing land to landless SC and ST farmers in Telangana for agricultural use.
benefits: 3 acres of agricultural land allotted free of cost to eligible SC/ST landless families.

description: Financial assistance for marriage of girls from SC, ST, BC, Minority communities in Telangana.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1,00,116 paid directly to the bride's bank account for marriage expenses.

description: Investment support scheme for farmers in Telangana providing ₹10,000 per acre per season for farm inputs.
benefits: ₹10,000 per acre per season (₹20,000/year) transferred directly to farmer's bank account.

description: Investment support scheme for farmers in Andhra Pradesh covering crop cultivation input costs.
benefits: ₹13,500 per year per farmer family — ₹7,500 from AP government and ₹6,000 from PM Kisan combined.

description: Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities to pursue professional/technical courses at recognized institutions.
benefits: ₹30,000/year for Group A courses (engineering, medicine), ₹20,000/year for Group B, ₹10,000/year for Group C.

description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to SC/ST and women borrowers for setting up greenfield enterprises.
benefits: Composite loan of ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore at bank rate, repayable in 7 years with 18-month moratorium.

description: Skill development program providing free short-duration skill training in industry-relevant trades for youth.
benefits: Free skill training, certification recognized by industry, monetary reward on certification (up to ₹8,000), placement assistance.

scheme_name: National Food Security Act — Public Distribution System
description: Subsidized food grains (rice, wheat, coarse grains) for priority households and Antyodaya families through Fair Price Shops.
benefits: 5 kg food grain per person per month at highly subsidized prices: rice ₹3/kg, wheat ₹2/kg, coarse grains ₹1/kg.

scheme_name: PM SVANidhi — Street Vendor Micro Credit
description: Micro credit facility for street vendors to resume livelihoods and move towards digital transactions.
benefits: Collateral-free working capital loan: ₹10,000 (1st), ₹20,000 (2nd), ₹50,000 (3rd) on timely repayment. 7% interest subsidy.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
description: Monthly pension for below poverty line senior citizens aged 60 and above under the National Social Assistance Programme.
benefits: ₹200/month for ages 60–79; ₹500/month for ages 80 and above, paid directly to bank account.

description: Monthly pension for widows aged 40–79 belonging to BPL households under National Social Assistance Programme.
benefits: ₹300/month financial assistance transferred directly to beneficiary's bank account.

scheme_name: Central Sector Scholarship for College Students
description: Merit-based scholarship for students from low-income families who scored 80th percentile or above in Class 12 board exams.
benefits: ₹12,000/year for first 3 years of UG studies; ₹20,000/year for PG studies, renewed annually based on performance.

description: Financial assistance for early-stage startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials and market entry.
benefits: Up to ₹20 lakh for PoC/prototype; up to ₹50 lakh for market entry via Incubators. Equity-free grants.

description: Low-interest loans for economically weaker Maratha community members in Maharashtra for business and education.
benefits: Loans up to ₹10 lakh at 1–6% interest for business; interest reimbursement scholarships for education up to ₹5 lakh.

description: Monthly pension for registered farmers in Kerala under the Kerala Karshaka Welfare Fund Board.
benefits: ₹1,600–₹2,500/month pension for registered farmers above 60 years with at least 5 years contribution.

description: Free distribution of aids and assistive devices to persons with disability to promote independence and quality of life.
benefits: Free provision of aids like wheelchairs, hearing aids, prosthetics, white canes, tricycles, Braille kits etc.
